attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who prioritizes jersey competitions (KOM) over stage wins, willing to expend energy in early/intermediate breakaways rather than saving for finale sprints.
team_tactics: Role fluctuates between protected status and domestique duty depending on team priorities; AG2R uses him flexibly as both KOM hunter and leadout rider for designated leaders like Naesen.
terrain_preference: Reduced bunch scenarios and hilly classics where breakaways can succeed; possesses underestimated sprint capacity from small groups that allows dual threat capability.
vulnerability: Team hierarchy uncertainty—can be demoted from defending champion to support role; lacks consistency as outright protected leader across season.
key_patterns: Proactive KOM jersey defense through breakaway positioning, twice observed targeting 40-point hauls.
Underestimated sprint capacity from reduced groups, demonstrated in Amstel finale response at 2km.
Team role fluctuates dramatically season-to-season, champion to domestique within same race calendar.
Prioritizes jersey competitions over stage hunting when in breakaways, strategic rather than opportunistic wins.
form_trajectory: negative: relegated from defending Bretagne Classic champion to leadout duty in 2022, suggesting declining team status
